programme.title: Rides Down Under: Aussie Truckers
programme.desc: We go behind the scenes to get a real-life insight into the trials and tribulations of one of Australia's premier independent trucking companies.

programme.title: Circuit Boats Drivers Championship
programme.desc: The final event of the 2025 Land Transport Junior NDC would crown the first ever Champions after a second round at the Mildura Ski Club.

programme.title: Supercars Highlights
programme.desc: Catch all the highlights of the historic first for Supercars in the NZ South Island and Christchurch at Ruapuna Raceway.

programme.title: Supercars Highlights
programme.desc: Catch all the highlights of the historic first for Supercars in the NZ South Island and Christchurch at Ruapuna Raceway.

programme.title: Supercars Highlights
programme.desc: Catch all the highlights of the historic first for Supercars in the NZ South Island and Christchurch at Ruapuna Raceway.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: Rick puts the pedal to the metal when NASCAR driver Greg Biffle asks him to restore his 1970s Montesa motorcycle. Later, the shop drives forward on a 1950s Kidillac.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Rene brings Gunther along to West Covina, California, for moral support, but gets annoyed when the older German will not take sides. Darrell stumbles over a potential diamond in the rough.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: In South Florida, the guys gain access to Bill's massive stockpile. Then, Mike falls for a century-old Royal Pioneer motorbike but baulks at the mammoth price tag.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars compete for gold-medal deals. A guy races in with a genuine Olympic torch carried in the opening ceremonies of the 1984 summer games. Rick eyes a diploma from the 1912 Olympics.

programme.title: The Agenda Setters: Rugby League
programme.desc: Corey Parker leads The Agenda Setters: Rugby League with an all-star panel, delivering sharp analysis and breaking news.

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: A massive nugget changes everything for one gold hunter, while the Gold Gypsies face the worst storm in decades, pushing their season to the brink.

programme.title: Adventure Gold Diggers
programme.desc: Businessman come Rookie Miner Dennis gambles half a million dollars on the purchase of a 62-acre gold mine in remote Queensland. Leigh invites two British backpackers onto the 1870 Clermont lease for a metal detector lesson without consulting Donnie, who's under pressure to find gold to repay their investor. Gold Sniper Levi breaks the Australian record for the biggest gold nugget ever sniped.

programme.title: Aussie Salvage Squad
programme.desc: A Top End trawler demolition bites back for Team Salvage as a five-metre croc patrols the area on a free-for-all mechanical nightmare; Shaun and Sarah dig deep as a wreck on the beach pushes them to breaking point.

programme.title: Mighty Ships
programme.desc: Climb aboard for an exclusive look at some of the coolest working vessels in the world.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Rene brings Gunther along to West Covina, California, for moral support, but gets annoyed when the older German will not take sides. Darrell stumbles over a potential diamond in the rough.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: In South Florida, the guys gain access to Bill's massive stockpile. Then, Mike falls for a century-old Royal Pioneer motorbike but baulks at the mammoth price tag.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars compete for gold-medal deals. A guy races in with a genuine Olympic torch carried in the opening ceremonies of the 1984 summer games. Rick eyes a diploma from the 1912 Olympics.

programme.title: Aussie Salvage Squad
programme.desc: A Top End trawler demolition bites back for Team Salvage as a five-metre croc patrols the area on a free-for-all mechanical nightmare; Shaun and Sarah dig deep as a wreck on the beach pushes them to breaking point.

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: A massive nugget changes everything for one gold hunter, while the Gold Gypsies face the worst storm in decades, pushing their season to the brink.

programme.title: Kings Of Pain
programme.desc: In Africa, Adam and Caveman Rob search for the Nile Monitor Lizard and the Velvet Ant but are attacked by an even deadlier animal and are lucky to escape with their lives.

programme.title: Mark Berg's Fishing Addiction
programme.desc: Fishing expert Mark Berg visits some of the best fishing destinations around. Chasing a wide variety of fish, Mark is always hoping to capture a new species or develop a new technique.

programme.title: Merv Hughes Fishing
programme.desc: Come fishing with Merv Hughes on some great fishing adventures. It's a lighthearted fishing show with some ripping catches.

programme.title: Creek to Coast
programme.desc: This program is all things boating, camping, four-wheel driving, outdoor adventuring, and fishing. From bush-bashing to cooking, caravanning to water sports, this show has it all.

programme.title: Mighty Ships
programme.desc: Climb aboard for an exclusive look at some of the coolest working vessels in the world.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie finds his office in shambles and alerts the authorities that the warehouse has had a break in. But Willie discovers that the culprit was his brother Jase, who needed supplies for a frog hunt.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When a heat wave envelops West Monroe, the air conditioning unit at the Duck Commander warehouse goes down, turning the duck call assembly room into a boiling sweatshop.

programme.title: Australia ReDiscovered
programme.desc: A bunch of iconic outback pubs? Sounds like a great idea for a road trip.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: Rick puts the pedal to the metal when NASCAR driver Greg Biffle asks him to restore his 1970s Montesa motorcycle. Later, the shop drives forward on a 1950s Kidillac.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Rene brings Gunther along to West Covina, California, for moral support, but gets annoyed when the older German will not take sides. Darrell stumbles over a potential diamond in the rough.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: In South Florida, the guys gain access to Bill's massive stockpile. Then, Mike falls for a century-old Royal Pioneer motorbike but baulks at the mammoth price tag.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars compete for gold-medal deals. A guy races in with a genuine Olympic torch carried in the opening ceremonies of the 1984 summer games. Rick eyes a diploma from the 1912 Olympics.

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: A massive nugget changes everything for one gold hunter, while the Gold Gypsies face the worst storm in decades, pushing their season to the brink.

programme.title: Adventure Gold Diggers
programme.desc: Businessman come Rookie Miner Dennis gambles half a million dollars on the purchase of a 62-acre gold mine in remote Queensland. Leigh invites two British backpackers onto the 1870 Clermont lease for a metal detector lesson without consulting Donnie, who's under pressure to find gold to repay their investor. Gold Sniper Levi breaks the Australian record for the biggest gold nugget ever sniped.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: An overflowing river of ice threatens to trap Marty with no way out of Alaska's Revelation Mountains. Tom's experiment on a lucrative bison hide goes up in flames.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: Rick has a riddle on his hands when an antique three-wheeled cart comes in with no identification. Later, the crew has a lot on their plate when a client trucks in a massive 1920s stove.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: During 'Bring Your Brother to Work Day' in Thousand Oaks, California, Justin sinks his money into a unit with an interesting pair. Dave pushes Mary to the breaking point.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: In Arkansas, Frank and Danielle pick a former trading post that's packed with awesome Americana; Dr Smith's family hospital has been shuttered for decades and it's filled with vintage medical curios; Cotton's roadside home looks like a rad junk shop but he's determined to hold on to every single piece.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: A 1923 Babe Ruth baseball card, graded a perfect 10, steps up to the plate. An autographed jersey of famed New York Yankees icon Lou Gehrig.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: In the Australian outback, when the going gets tough, the tough drive trucks. Outback truckers drive the biggest trucks on Earth along the toughest roads and loneliest highways.

programme.title: Cape Carnage: Killer Catch
programme.desc: Juanita goes missing at Cape Carnage and Bruce disembarks. As tides worsen, Tiger decides to steam to Karumba to unload, but his plan backfires and the Wildcard is forced into a U-turn.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: In the Australian outback, when the going gets tough, the tough drive trucks. Outback truckers drive the biggest trucks on Earth along the toughest roads and loneliest highways.

programme.title: Railroad Australia
programme.desc: A group of trainee train drivers face the reality of life on the lines. Meanwhile, Metro Train's Craigieburn Maintenance Depot battles to meet the network's demands.

programme.title: IRT: Deadliest Roads
programme.desc: All three trucking teams get a little entertainment in on the side when truckers Tim Zickuhr and GW Boles show what they've got in a Bolivian Cholita wrestling ring.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: During 'Bring Your Brother to Work Day' in Thousand Oaks, California, Justin sinks his money into a unit with an interesting pair. Dave pushes Mary to the breaking point.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: In Arkansas, Frank and Danielle pick a former trading post that's packed with awesome Americana; Dr Smith's family hospital has been shuttered for decades and it's filled with vintage medical curios; Cotton's roadside home looks like a rad junk shop but he's determined to hold on to every single piece.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: A 1923 Babe Ruth baseball card, graded a perfect 10, steps up to the plate. An autographed jersey of famed New York Yankees icon Lou Gehrig.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: In the Australian outback, when the going gets tough, the tough drive trucks. Outback truckers drive the biggest trucks on Earth along the toughest roads and loneliest highways.

programme.title: IRT: Deadliest Roads
programme.desc: All three trucking teams get a little entertainment in on the side when truckers Tim Zickuhr and GW Boles show what they've got in a Bolivian Cholita wrestling ring.

programme.title: Kings Of Pain
programme.desc: A dangerous underwater hunt for the potentially deadly Scorpion Fish in the Baja California Ocean leads to a toxic sting that puts Adam in danger and matches the highest pain score to date.

programme.title: Mark Berg's Fishing Addiction
programme.desc: Fishing expert Mark Berg visits some of the best fishing destinations around. Chasing a wide variety of fish, Mark is always hoping to capture a new species or develop a new technique.

programme.title: Merv Hughes Fishing
programme.desc: Come fishing with Merv Hughes on some great fishing adventures. It's a lighthearted fishing show with some ripping catches.

programme.title: Creek to Coast
programme.desc: Scott catches mud crabs, by hand. Olivia shares camp oven care tips. Gary offers trailer maintenance know-how and Liz hits the waves on the Gold Coast.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: After Korie decides the junk piles in the Duck Commander warehouse are beginning to reach critical mass, she calls on Willie and the guys to do a little company spring-cleaning.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When attending a local radio show as a guest, Willie makes the mistake of bringing Uncle Si on the air with him. Meanwhile, Jase gets in trouble with his Homeowners Association.

programme.title: Supercars Highlights
programme.desc: Catch all the highlights of the historic first for Supercars in the NZ South Island and Christchurch at Ruapuna Raceway.

programme.title: Australia ReDiscovered
programme.desc: The iconic outback pubs that played a major role in one of Australia's most intriguing and tragic stories: Burke and Wills.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: Rick has a riddle on his hands when an antique three-wheeled cart comes in with no identification. Later, the crew has a lot on their plate when a client trucks in a massive 1920s stove.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: During 'Bring Your Brother to Work Day' in Thousand Oaks, California, Justin sinks his money into a unit with an interesting pair. Dave pushes Mary to the breaking point.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: In Arkansas, Frank and Danielle pick a former trading post that's packed with awesome Americana; Dr Smith's family hospital has been shuttered for decades and it's filled with vintage medical curios; Cotton's roadside home looks like a rad junk shop but he's determined to hold on to every single piece.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: A 1923 Babe Ruth baseball card, graded a perfect 10, steps up to the plate. An autographed jersey of famed New York Yankees icon Lou Gehrig.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: In the Australian outback, when the going gets tough, the tough drive trucks. Outback truckers drive the biggest trucks on Earth along the toughest roads and loneliest highways.
